evals.description: Basic conventional commit with scope for a new feature
evals.prompt: I just added a new OAuth login feature to the auth module. Please commit my staged changes.

expectations.assertion: Commit message includes a scope related to auth or oauth
Subject line does not end with a period
Subject begins with lowercase after the colon

evals.description: Bug fix commit with issue reference
evals.prompt: I fixed the null pointer crash in the API serializer. This fixes issue #42. Please commit.

expectations.assertion: Commit message references #42 in the body or footer
Uses Fixes or Closes keyword for the issue reference

expectations: Subject describes the fix, not just 'fix bug'

evals.prompt: I removed the deprecated /v1/users endpoint. This is a breaking change. Please commit.

expectations.assertion: Commit message includes ! before the colon OR includes BREAKING CHANGE in footer

expectations: Commit message explains what was removed

expectations.assertion: Commit type is feat or fix or refactor

evals.prompt: I updated the README with new installation instructions. Please commit.

expectations.assertion: Subject mentions README or documentation or installation
Does not use feat or fix type

evals.prompt: I refactored the database connection pooling to use async/await. This closes #100 and is related to #101. Please commit with a detailed message.

expectations.assertion: Commit has a body (not just a subject line)

expectations: Body provides context about what changed
